query: "gas prices" OR "gasoline prices" OR "oil prices" OR petrol

articles.title: Indian economy remains exposed to energy price shocks: RBI report
articles.description: India's economy faces potential exchange rate volatility due to rising oil prices and supply chain issues, an RBI report revealed. Despite strong fundamentals, the nation remains vulnerable to energy price shocks and geopolitical tensions. While recent policy measures have eased pressure on the rupee and bond yields, attracting capital remains a focus amidst global uncertainties.

articles.title: Families will be ‘aghast’ at phased withdrawal of fuel tax cuts, Sinn Féin says
articles.description: Cabinet has agreed to begin gradual reduction of reliefs, worth 32 cent on litre of diesel and 27 cent on petrol, from September 1st

articles.title: Consumer confidence ticks up as gas prices fall, economic gloom lingers
articles.description: Americans’ attitudes toward the economy improved slightly this month as gas prices declined, but their outlook is still mostly negative.
